message:
Update subscription cursor after backfill delivery

Fix cursor alignment issue where subscription introspection would show
stale cursors after a backfill operation:

handlers.ts:
- After sending backfill response, update the subscription cursor to
  replayResult.lastCursor if the channel is still subscribed
- This ensures ping/introspection reports show the actual last-received
  message cursor rather than the cursor from before backfill

This prevents clients from re-requesting the same backfill data on
subsequent introspection checks.

Also updates ws.handlers.test.ts with corresponding test adjustments
and syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
